prestazioni: Engine: 3.0L M44/43 inline-4 (968-specific variant) with a custom 88mm forged crankshaft from Mahle Motorsport, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods and JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (11.5:1 compression) for high-RPM durability and 400+ HP potential on race fuel.

Forced induction: Single Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with a custom 3.5" V-band downpipe, GReddy Type-R blow-off valve, and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup (Garrett core) mounted in the front bumper with dual 10" SPAL fans for consistent intake temps under 40°C.

Fuel & Ignition: Full Motec M150 ECU with a custom flex-fuel map, paired with Bosch Motorsport 0280158863 800cc injectors, a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a custom dual-spark ignition system using MSD 8510 coils and NGK R7437-9 racing plugs gapped at 0.024" for optimized combustion under boost.
estetica: Chassis: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (968-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 2.5" extended wheelbase conversion using custom subframe spacers and adjustable rear trailing arms for aggressive stance and improved high-speed stability.

Wheels & Tires: BBS LM-R 18x10.5" (front) and 18x12" (rear) with custom 5x130 PCD adapters, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/18 front, 315/30/18 rear) for maximum mechanical grip, paired with AP Racing CP6640-1000 356mm front and CP5555-1000 330mm rear brake kits with custom aluminum caliper brackets.

Interior: Full Recaro Pole Position II carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with a Motec C127 digital dash replacing the stock cluster for real-time data logging and boost monitoring.
